Documentation.short_help: Split dataset into tet volume, then node sets, then side sets.
Documentation.long_help: Tetrahedra (if any) are extracted first under vtkDataAssembly IOSS/element_blocks/tetrahedra with contiguous GlobalIds (1..N) for IOSS writers. PartitionedDataSetCollection block order is then all node{i} blocks (node_sets), then all side{i} blocks (side_sets). Surface for sets comes from vtkDataSetSurfaceFilter on the tet-only submesh when tets exist (with element_side for Exodus side sets), else polydata or full-dataset surface; split by feature angle and vtkPolyDataConnectivityFilter regions. Block metadata sets NAME and vtkIOSSReader ENTITY_ID: one ascending id per block in output order (tet block if present, then each node set, then each side set), so ids do not repeat across those groups.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FeatureAngle
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Feature angle (deg)
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Dihedral angle threshold for vtkPolyDataNormals splitting (cusp / sharp edge split). Larger values merge more smooth neighborhoods; smaller values split more aggressively.
